title: LoL Cave Sounds - Funny Minecraft!
description: Adds and changes Cave sounds to Polish, Ukrainian and Russian memes in Minecraft. Try it, because it's very funny!
body:
[Обзор будущей версии! (new version!)](https://youtube.com/shorts/85H6-r67SjQ?si=nSlYFXhKZ62lUx7L)
**In this RP, you'll find over 30 amusing sounds that will add a new level of fun and variety to your Minecraft world!** 
This RP features Ukrainian, Russian, and Polish memes - making your cave exploration journey even more entertaining!

Want to share your ideas or noticed something that needs improvement? Simply follow this link [LCS link](https://forms.gle/P53vzAYcq93Ma2Jd8) to share your thoughts with us. I'm always ready to make changes to make your adventure even more thrilling.

**🗣️🔥🔥💯 Attention! Our RP contains explicit language and shouts!!**
